Latest Jobs

Maintenance Planner — Ok Tedi

Tabubil, Western Province PNG

Ok Tedi Mining Limited (OTML) is hiring an experienced Maintenance Planner to support the heavy mobile fleet at Tabubil. CMMS / Maximo experience essential. Permanent residential role.

Process Operator x10 — Lihir Gold Operations

Lihir Island, New Ireland PNG

Newmont Lihir is recruiting Process Operators for the gold processing plant. FIFO 4/4 ex-Cairns/Port Moresby. Refractory ore experience advantageous.

HSE Advisor — Papua LNG

Port Moresby, PNG

TotalEnergies EP PNG is hiring HSE Advisors to support pre-FEED site investigations across the Papua LNG project footprint.
